title: Thai Crab Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Thai-inspired dish featuring crab, vegetables, and a blend of spices. Serve with steamed rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the bitter melon and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the crab meat and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Add the Thai red curry paste, fish sauce, sugar, and chili flakes. Cook for 1 minute, until the sauce is fragrant.
Stir in the cilantro and serve immediately.
Serve with steamed rice and garnish with lime wedges.
